assertion_results.text: Output specifies internal/product/domain/contract/ as the correct location
assertion_results.evidence: Answer says 'internal/product/domain/product.go or a dedicated contracts file' — does not name the 'domain/contract/' directory

assertion_results.text: Output states the interface must be owned by the domain layer
assertion_results.evidence: Answer states 'the domain layer owns the port (interface)'

assertion_results.text: Output states the infrastructure layer is responsible for implementing the interface
assertion_results.evidence: Answer states 'the infrastructure layer provides the adapter (concrete implementation)'

assertion_results.text: Output does NOT suggest placing the interface in the infrastructure or application layer
assertion_results.evidence: Answer places the contract in the domain layer only
